scribe.assessment: China's geopolitical posture remains assertive in the South China Sea region. State-directed industrial policy continues to prioritise domestic energy technology at the expense of foreign operators. Regulatory risk for foreign wind energy companies is elevated.

Taiwan's cross-strait tension remains the dominant risk driver. Critical infrastructure operators are at elevated risk of state-sponsored cyber operations linked to People's Liberation Army units. Supply chain dependencies on mainland components create dual-exposure.

top_results.title: Ransomware groups increasingly target energy sector OT networks
